entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume crop studied for growth vigour inheritance

entities.name: GROWTH VIGOUR
entities.description: A characteristic influencing the establishment of a normal crop in chickpea

entities.name: F2 POPULATION
entities.description: The second filial generation used to study segregation of growth vigour

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED LINES
entities.description: Lines produced by repeated selfing used to analyze trait ratios

entities.name: BC1P2
entities.description: Backcross generation used to analyze trait ratios

entities.name: DUPLICATE DOMINANT EPISTASIS
entities.description: A genetic interaction where two genes control a trait with dominant effects

entities.name: DAYS TO FIRST FLOWER
entities.description: The time taken from sowing to the appearance of the first flower

entities.name: DAYS TO 50% FLOWERING
entities.description: The time taken for 50% of the plants to flower

entities.name: DAYS TO FIRST POD
entities.description: The time taken from sowing to the appearance of the first pod

entities.name: DAYS TO MATURITY
entities.description: The time taken for the crop to reach full maturity

entities.name: CORRELATION
entities.description: Statistical method used to determine the relationship between growth vigour and other characters
